name: hybrid-loops
description: Hybrid loops — a design pattern where LLM judgment and deterministic code form a mutually-generative cycle, not a pipeline. Each half produces the next half's working surface. Diagnostic-first skill + library of named graph-shapes.

plugins.name: hybrid-loops
plugins.description: Design surfaces where LLM judgment and deterministic code alternate as mutually-generative layers — each producing the working surface the other operates over. Lens → substrate → gate → reasoner → action, with calibration and metabolism closing the loop. Stacks at runtime and during development. Diagnostic-first skill plus a library of recognizable hybrid-loop block-graphs (RAG, ReAct, codegen-with-verification, multi-agent panels, dev-time critique loops, knowledge-base auditors, and more).
